title: Free breakfast clubs: school case studies
body: "Since April 2025, the Department for Education has funded 750 schools to deliver a free breakfast club as part of the free breakfast club early adopters scheme.  Early adopter schools are funded to deliver a breakfast club which:   lasts a minimum of 30 minutes is free and available to all pupils includes food   Schools have the flexibility to deliver the free breakfast club in a way that best meets the needs of their school, pupils and families.  These case studies showcase the different ways schools are delivering the free breakfast clubs and include examples of :   staffing logistics food offerings how schools are ensuring the clubs are inclusive for pupils with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND)  "

taxons.title: School food, accommodation, transport and uniform
